Furious avian projectile. Highly skilled in launching myself out of a giant slingshot to destroy precarious structures built by thieving green pigs.
Professional sweet matcher. I have spent years swiping brightly colored treats, waiting for lives to regenerate, and accidentally spending real money on extra moves.
Botanical defense strategist. I plant heavily armed flora, including explosive cherries and weaponized peas, to stop the undead from crossing my lawn and eating my brains.
Pixelated aviator. My only skill is flapping my wings exactly once every time you tap, trying to navigate between green pipes. Known to cause immense frustration and broken phones.
Village chief. I spend days waiting for a single building to finish upgrading, only to log in and find my base completely destroyed by a massive army of dragons.
Master fruit slicer. Excellent at swiping across the screen to chop flying watermelons and pineapples in half. Extremely cautious around random bombs tossed into the mix.
Endless runner. Relentlessly pursued by demonic monkeys after stealing a cursed idol. Highly skilled in swiping left, swiping right, and occasionally forgetting to duck under a tree root.
Candy delivery expert. Specialize in slicing strings at the exact right moment to swing a piece of candy into the mouth of a small, hungry green monster named Om Nom.
Four-legged alien jumper. I bounce endlessly upwards on green platforms, shooting pencils from my nose at monsters, and trying not to fall into the abyss.
Augmented reality walker. I wander around local parks and highly inappropriate real-world locations staring at my phone, trying to flick digital balls at virtual monsters. Team Mystic.
Mobile arena brawler. Excellent at hiding in bushes, collecting gems, and getting completely destroyed by a kid playing a luchador character.
Card-based castle destroyer. I deploy knights, goblins, and fireballs onto a bridge. Extremely prone to spamming the laughing king emote when I win by one hit point.
Tavern card player. 'Well Met!' I build decks of magical creatures and spells. Highly prone to relying completely on random number generation to win. The innkeeper loves me.
Militarized annelid. Wielding an arsenal of absurd weapons, including explosive sheep and holy hand grenades. Often eliminated by miscalculating the wind on a bazooka shot.
Endless runner. Using an incredibly dangerous machine gun jetpack to steal coins and avoid zappers in a secret laboratory. Occasional rides on a giant mechanical dragon.
